spec_match.rationale: Shows the support matrix for window drag across platforms and display modes.

interactive.rationale: Reference card format with limited interactivity — appropriate for a support matrix.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a support matrix; delivers a clear table.

edge_cases.rationale: Support matrix is a reference page, edge cases don't apply.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: renders correctly. No console errors.
